name: Field Greens with Orange Vinaigrette
recipeIngredient: 2 plum tomatoes, concasse and torn into bite-sized pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. In a saucepan, combine the oil, balsamic vinegar, orange juice, orange concentrate, minced garlic, minced shallots, and black pepper.
2. Heat the mixture until it is hot, then let it cool slightly.
3. Arrange the mixed field greens and torn tomatoes on plates.
4. Refrigerate until ready to serve.
